text.title: spec-writing Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for spec-writing as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Generic NFR boilerplate: "99.99% uptime", "GDPR compliant" pasted without source or justification.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Generic NFRs fabricated without contractual or regulatory basis waste engineering effort on unnecessary hardening.
